cases.input: Draft a PRD for the User Onboarding epic. The epic covers: account creation, email verification, profile setup wizard, and first value moment.
cases.context: Mode A SaaS, understanding doc available, 3 personas: new user, power user, admin, Fibonacci story points, e-learning platform

cases.input: Write user stories for the Payment Processing epic. Include stories for checkout, saved payment methods, and refund requests.
cases.context: PRD draft mode, INVEST compliance required, As-a/I-want/So-that format, 3-8 Given-When-Then acceptance criteria per story, MH/SH/CH priority

cases.input: We have user stories written as 'As a user, I want to see my order history...' Can we use this format?
cases.context: prd-draft quality rule: As a user is never acceptable, must reference named persona from Section 2, 3 defined personas in this PRD

cases.input: Our user stories all have happy path acceptance criteria. Do we need to add error scenarios?
cases.context: prd-draft rule: every story needs at least one happy path, one boundary, and one error/negative AC - happy path only is invalid

cases.input: All 15 user stories in our PRD are marked Must Have. Is this acceptable?
cases.context: prd-draft rule: at least 60% MH is acceptable but 100% MH needs re-prioritization, max 20% Could Have, MH first ordering
